title: Vanilla Essentials (a PvP Pack)
description: A texture pack designed for Vanilla PvP, allowing you to climb the ranks of Vanilla PvP in comfort.
body:
## Vanilla Essentials
A texture pack designed for Vanilla PvP, allowing you to climb the ranks of Vanilla PvP in comfort.

## Features:

> Dark GUI

> Low Shield

> Low Fire

> Mini Totem

> Mini Items

> Low Grass

> Unintrusive Weather

> Transparent Pumpkin Blur

> Transparent Water
